# Magnum

Personal workspace for work-related projects, notes, and experiments.

## AI Team Configuration (autogenerated by team-configurator, 2026-07-05)

**Important: YOU MUST USE subagents when available for the task.**

This repository is a multi-project workspace. No single application stack is
pinned at the root — each project added under this repo brings its own stack,
and the framework specialists below activate automatically when that stack is
detected. The core, orchestrator, and universal agents apply to every project.

Agents live in [.claude/agents/awesome-claude-agents/](.claude/agents/awesome-claude-agents/)
(vendored from [vijaythecoder/awesome-claude-agents](https://github.com/vijaythecoder/awesome-claude-agents), MIT).

### Standing team (applies to all projects)

| Task | Agent | Notes |
|------|-------|-------|
| Plan / break down any multi-step task | `tech-lead-orchestrator` | Delegates work; assigns each task to a specialist |
| Analyse a new project / unfamiliar code | `project-analyst` | Detects stack and structure |
| (Re)configure the team after adding a project | `team-configurator` | Refreshes this section for the detected stack |
| Explore or document legacy / unfamiliar code | `code-archaeologist` | Read-only investigation |
| Review after every change | `code-reviewer` | Security-aware; **run on every feature** |
| Diagnose slowness / cost / scaling | `performance-optimizer` | Performance work |
| Write or update docs | `documentation-specialist` | Project documentation |
| Design an API (REST / GraphQL) | `api-architect` | Framework-agnostic |
| Server-side code (no framework match) | `backend-developer` | Universal fallback |
| UI work (no framework match) | `frontend-developer` | Universal fallback |
| Tailwind CSS styling | `tailwind-frontend-expert` | Utility-first styling |

### Framework specialists (activate when a project uses that stack)

Available specialist families under `.claude/agents/awesome-claude-agents/specialized/`:

- **React** — `react-component-architect`, `react-nextjs-expert`
- **Vue** — `vue-component-architect`, `vue-nuxt-expert`, `vue-state-manager`
- **Django** — `django-backend-expert`, `django-api-developer`, `django-orm-expert`
- **Laravel** — `laravel-backend-expert`, `laravel-eloquent-expert`
- **Rails** — `rails-backend-expert`, `rails-api-developer`, `rails-activerecord-expert`
- **Python** — `python-expert`, `fastapi-expert`, `ml-data-expert`, `testing-expert`, `security-expert`, `devops-cicd-expert`, `performance-expert`, `web-scraping-expert`

### How to use

- Prefer a framework-specific agent; if none matches, use the nearest universal agent.
- Always include `code-reviewer` and `performance-optimizer` in the loop.
- When you add a new project under this repo, run `team-configurator` again to
  refresh this section for that project's detected stack.

> Example: "@tech-lead-orchestrator build a FastAPI endpoint for uploading a report"
